Based on your framework analysis:

**Best Position Income CC:**

**Best LEAPS:**
None qualify - all showing poor timing signals (high IVP + near highs/lows) or quality issues

High volatility environment with most core positions showing 59-84% IVP - favorable for selling premium but poor timing for buying LEAPS.
